{{Quote|Oh, sure, it's not like they are really any use in day-to-day life, but I think they are some of the beautiful weapons around.|Dr.Itlar|<ref name="GFT" />}}
The '''coyn'skar''' was a bladed polearm manufactured by [[Ekkar Armaments]] for the [[Coynite/Legends|Coynites]]. The weapon was a lengthy shaft designed to offer maximum grip. One end of the coyn'skar was a sharp blade, while the other had a hook that could be used to trip and disarm opponents. [[Doctor/Legends|Dr.]] [[Itlar]] owned a complete set of Ekkar Armaments weapons, including a coyn'skar, that were obtained on a visit to a weapons factory. Itlar would practice with the weapons by dueling with friends.<ref name="GFT" />
